college_info.college_name: MGVM's Karmaveer Bhausaheb Hiray, Dental College and Hospital: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for MGVM s Karmaveer Bhausaheb Hiray, Dental College and Hospital admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: MGVM's Karmaveer Bhausaheb Hiray, Dental College and Hospital, is located in Nashik, Maharashtra. It is an institute approved by DCI. MGVM's Karmaveer Bhausaheb Hiray, Dental College and Hospital provides 8 UG and PG courses in 5 specialisations, namely Oral Medicine & Radiology, Oral Pathology , Orthodontics , Periodontology and Prosthodontics. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. BDS and MDS are some of the courses offered at MGVM's Karmaveer Bhausaheb Hiray, Dental College and Hospital. Some of the stream in which these courses are offered include Medicine & Health Sciences. The total fee at MGVM's Karmaveer Bhausaheb Hiray, Dental College and Hospital ranges between INR 7,86,024 to 14,35,808. MGVM's Karmaveer Bhausaheb Hiray, Dental College and Hospital has a student intake of 129 for all the courses. The average median package at MGVM's Karmaveer Bhausaheb Hiray, Dental College and Hospital is INR 2,80,500. MGVM's Karmaveer Bhausaheb Hiray, Dental College and Hospital offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a place where you learn and grow.

review_content.Placements: The college has 100 students per year. A compulsory internship is offered for a year after the final year. 100 percent of students get internships. Monthly postings start in the third year and continue until the internship ends. A group of 13 students is placed in each department for a month or 15 days.
review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen provides good, homely food. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Classrooms are well-equipped. All kinds of medical and sports facilities are provided. Participation in national and university leagues is encouraged. Students are given ample time to pursue their hobbies.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: All facilities are available in the college, like library, sports area, etc.

review_content.Placements: As it is a dental college, there is no placement after completing the course. You can go for the NEET PG examination, or else you can open up your clinic. PG is also available in the college, which offers around 7 dental branches. PG content overall has 21 branches.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are also very good. Wi-Fi is also available. The library is also available, which includes a good number of books.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are highly qualified, which helps in easy understanding of the student, and all the courses are under MUHS Maharashtra University of Health Science. Every year, before the final exam 3 exams are conducted by the college, 1st sessional, 2nd sessional, and the preliminary exam.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is the absolute best college in the state. It stands at 29th place all over India.

review_content.Placements: Each batch consists of 100 students. The stipend in internships is paid to students and PGs. Students are placed in the government hospital. Every student is compulsorily made to do internships, whether it may be in our college itself or other government or private organisations where we want.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well-updated this year. Classrooms are good and clean. Good desks are available here. A good study environment is made. Wi-Fi is available there. The library is underground in the college, since there is no disturbance. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. It serves good food.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the teaching facilities and practice.

review_content.Placements: The college provides one year of internship programs. Patient flow is good, and we start practicing on patients in the 3rd year of the course, so we are well prepared to start our private practice or to appear for the postgraduate exam. We also get alumni of our college who are flourishing in their professional lives, and some of them are well settled in foreign countries and help and guide students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. All departments are provided with the necessary instruments, and sterilization protocols are followed strictly. Classrooms have projectors to make learning more interesting. The college has a library equipped with many books, journals, and newspapers. The college has a playground. The hostel infrastructure is not so good as compared to other hostels, but the staff is cooperative, and the food quality in the mess is not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: There is a very good patient flow for students to practice.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100 students take admission in every academic year in our college. Out of 100 students, about 85 admissions belong to government quota, while 15 admissions belong to NRI or management quota. There is a good patient flow in the hospital to practice, and a 1-year duration internship is provided. MS (PG) course is also available, and there are no placements because it is a dental field.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility, latest technology labs, huge classrooms and a neat library are available here. The food served in the mess is average, and the hostel rooms are average. The canteen is also average, and a huge ground for sports and cultural activities is available. There are excellent medical facilities, and students are motivated to participate in events.

faqs.question: Can Mahavir Institute of Medical Sciences be considered as a reputed Institute?
faqs.answer: Mahavir Institute of Medical Sciences is a distinguished institution offering MD, MS, MBBS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. Mahavir Institute of Medical Sciences is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Mahavir Institute of Medical Sciences has received an impressive review rating of 5 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 5 for Campus Life, 5 for Placements, 5 for Faculty, and 5 for Infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: About 90% of students will be placed in various hospitals each year. We get recruited by top hospitals across India, but majorly in our state. About 90% of students will get internships from our college in various hospitals. The major role offered is as the HOD of a subject in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every facility is perfect, except for water management in our college. The labs are very good and hygienic. The library is very well-maintained by our faculty members and our in-charge with a vast selection of quality books. The mess is clean, with high-quality food.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Great College with Good Faculty, Beautiful Campus, Very Less Patient flow in the hospital.

review_content.Placements: Each Batch of MBBS has about 150 students. Medical College Placements depend on the individual as PG Preparation is self. As far as college is concerned, Internship is must for Graduation and License. All of the 150 Students have to be Posted into Internship for atleast 9 months.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are total of about 5 Blocks for Students,Teachers, Interns. Girls Hostel, Senior Boys Hostel and Junior Boys Hostel are separated. As to keep the juniors out of the ragging culture for the 1st year. Hostels have allotted Study room. College has Good Labs with lot of equipments, 2 Big Lecture Halls for Classes, Huge Library with Good Seating very spacious. Quality of food has improved alot in the last 2 years.College has a VERY big Ground. Football Goal Posts, Badminton Nets, Basketball Court, Tabletennis, Gym. Lot of sports are played Football,Cricket, Volleyball,Table Tennis, Badminton, Basketball.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college with many facilities, good food, and qualified teachers.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement in our college. It is a medical college and not the highest and the lowest package offers. There are no recruiting companies for our course. All the students who pass the fourth year are eligible for internships in our college. The role offered is a doctor.
review_content.Infrastructure: It provides very good quality of food in mess and canteen. Medical hospital is there. Basketball, football, cricket, and everything are there. All the labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, and library are available. Every facility is there in our college. Every year, a sports fest is held in our college, and all students participate in the events.

highlights.summary: Admission to Lifeline Institute of Management and Science is now open for 2025. Candidates interested must visit the official website of the Institute to apply for the same.

college_info.intro: Lifeline Institute of Management and Science offers courses in UG and Diploma levels. The Institute offers these courses in full-time mode with a total tuition fee ranging from INR 77K to INR 3.4 Lakh. Furthermore, admission to the majority of courses is offered on the basis of merit and would require candidates to secure a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12. To apply for the same, candidates must visit the official website of the Institute and complete the selection process. For more details around Lifeline Institute of Management and Science popular programmes, check out the table below:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BBA at Lifeline Institute of Management & Science?

faqs.answer: A:    The course fee for BBA at Lifeline Institute of Management & Science is INR 3.4 lakh. Candidates are required to fill the form and apply for the merit based admission process in order to get a chance at securing a seat in the programme. Candidates who get the final admission offer are eligible to pay the course fee according to the guidelines and confirm their admission.

admission_process.title: Lifeline Institute of Management & Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The admission process for Lifeline Institute of Management & Science is merit-based. Candidates must initiate the admission process by filling out the application form and going through the next admission steps sequentially. Check out the step-wise admission process given below :
Step 1: Lifeline Institute of Management & Science Application Process 2025

Candidates wishing to apply for courses at Lifeline Institute of Management & Science must visit the official website and go to the admissions section. Candidates can find the admission form online and fill out the details that have been asked for, such as their category, course they wish to apply to, etc.Step 2: Selection & Shortlisting Candidates

Candidates who have filled out the application form and applied for admission are then shortlisted based on their academic merit. Candidates are evaluated based on the information that has been provided in the application form.
Step 3: Document Verification and Fee Payment

Candidates who have made it to the final admission round can pay the course fee to secure their seat in the programme. Candidates are required to pay the course fee through the means provided by the institute. Candidates are required to appear for the document verification round so that the institute can verify their candidature.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in the courses at Lifeline Institute of Management & Science if I have 50% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates with a minimum of 50% aggregate in class 12 are eligible to apply for all the courses at Lifeline Institute of Management & Science. faqs.question: What are the admission steps for securing a seat at Lifeline Institute of Management & Science?
faqs.answer: The admission process for courses at Lifeline Institute of Management & Science is a multi-step process. Candidates initially need to apply through the form on the official website of the institute.Candidates are then shortlisted based on their academic merit. Candidates who get the final admission offer then go through the document verification process and the payment of fee.

faqs.question: What are the documents required for admission to Lifeline Institute of Management and Science?
faqs.answer: The list of documents that are considered while applying for admission to Vivekananda Institute of Advanced Studies includes a filled and signed admission form, a photocopy of the mark sheet and degree of the examination passed, photocopy of the class X and XII marks statement along with the photocopy of the score card of any of the management tests like CAT/ MAT/ XAT and valid score, photocopy of the Aadhaar Card, photocopy of the PAN However, an application fee of INR 500 must also be made in the form of a demand draft for becoming a part of the program.

faqs.question: Is CUET compulsory for BBA admission at Lifeline Institute of Management and Science?
faqs.answer: No,CUET(Common University Entrance Test) is not generally mandatory for BBA admission at Lifeline Institute of Management and Science. Admissions are typically based onmerit, previous academic performance, or entrance exams conducted by the institution itself. However, it's advisable to confirm the latest requirements directly with the institute.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: If you want to become a good experienced professional practitioner, then OPD here helps you.

review_content.Placements: About 90% of students were placed in this course. The most important thing in a medical or dental college is that the OPD of the college must be good enough so that the upcoming interns may deal with more patients, thus improving their skills and experience. Here, the OPD is great and you get a lot of patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: The lecture halls are fully air-conditioned with projectors. The labs are well-maintained. The library is quite good. The departments are clean almost. The quality of food is great, and anything you want, from drinks to snacks, is almost always available in the canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with very nice teachers.

review_content.Placements: About 25% of the students from our batch got placed, and the highest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Most of the students get placements. Good companies also visit our college for placements, and also national and international companies. Internships are needed to get placements,
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available in our college, and labs are cleaned. Classrooms are air-conditioned, and there is a huge library with all medical course books. Our college provides good food, mineral water and good rooms in the hostel. Rooms are air-conditioned, and there is a family atmosphere. Gym and sports room are available in our college hostel.

review_summary.college_name: Dolphin (PG) College of Science and Agriculture Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Cardiac Care Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good paramedical college.

content.Placements: Students are from different states of India. The majority are from Kashmir and the Northeast. The maximum package can vary from hospital to hospital and sector to sector. Many students get internships in good hospitals and are hired there as employees. It is a paramedic college which is in high demand these days.
content.Infrastructure: High-quality classrooms with a good environment. 24-hour Wi-Fi is provided. The library has a good collection of books. Books are available for issue for 15 days. The mess and canteen food are good, and there are 24-hour medical facilities. Different sports are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Optometry - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am disappointed from this college.

content.Placements: 60% students got placed from suhana hospital. 20000 to 30000 for per month are the salaries offered. Suhana hospital is the top recruiter. The college doesn't give us internships.
content.Infrastructure: The boys hostel is very far away form college, almost 1 to 2 kms away from the college. The college provides bus but it only runs in 6 months. For the rest of the 6 months, we walk and go to the college. The hostel has Wi-Fi but its speed is very disappointing. Food is good but in sometimes we don't eat the hostel food. Sports activities like cricket, volleyball, and kabaddi are played in the college .

review_summary.college_name: Bharti Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (B. A. M. S.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good. Sports and extracurricular activities are not held properly here.

content.Placements: About 50-60% of students get placed in the college. The lowest salary offered ranges from Rs. 15,000-25,000 per month, and the highest salary offered ranges from Rs. 90,000 to 1 lac per month. Many companies like BHU, Patanjali, Himalaya, Kama Ayurveda, etc., visit the college for placements. Almost 90-100% of students get an internship in government hospitals. A top role offered is a medical officer.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well maintained. Classrooms are good, and all classrooms have a projector. The library is good. Girls hostel is average, but boys hostel is not good. The quality of food served in a mess is average. Two canteens are available on campus. Sports facilities are not good in our college, but medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: It is a well-developed college campus.

content.Placements: In our course of civil engineering, more than 40% of the students got placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 12,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 4,000 per month. Almost 70% of the students from our batch got an internship from college. Many companies provided internships to our college students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities are very good, and they provide Wi-Fi for students for the study purpose. There is a well-developed library with thousands of books. Hostel rooms are a bit small, and in one room, 2-3 students are placed. Canteen and medical facilities are also very good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the finest colleges in Chhattisgarh.

content.Placements: I don't get any placement in any company though I gave 3 interviews in campus selection. But only for the experience. Most companies visited the campus are a startup company. I received a good amount of experience in giving interviews. And I also gain practical knowledge about working in the Company.
content.Infrastructure: Each block is allotted for different branches of engineering and medical branches. The college is surrounded naturally. It has a separate entrance for faculty and students. Each building has more than 5 floors, and it looks very attractive from far. The college is spread over more than a thousand acres.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bharti College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good for computer science and IT departments only. It is moderate for the ENTC department. There are no placements for mechanical and civil departments. So, if you are taking admission in CSE or IT department, you have chances to get placed. Placements are good enough compared to other private colleges of Rajasthan and north region colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is according to the fee that they charge. It is moderate. The college has all the basic facilities that are required in a college. You cannot expect the infrastructure of our college to be like VIT and SRM. They are working hard on improving its infrastructure. Wi-Fi facility is available in few areas on the campus. Its speed is very poor, so you cannot expect much about it.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: If you are looking just for a degree, then join this college.

content.Placements: Companies visit the campus rarely, and hardly anyone gets placed. The placement rate is very low. Students should not expect placements from this college. If you are looking for placements, it's better not to join this college. There is no placement assistance. You should find jobs on your own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and there are big buildings. Our campus is huge, but there is no playground. There are large buildings, but no facilities are available. The basic facilities are quite good but not extraordinary. There are labs which are barely in working condition.

hostel_campus.college_name: Bharti Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good. Sports and extracurricular activities are not held properly here.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well maintained. Classrooms are good, and all classrooms have a projector. The library is good. Girls hostel is average, but boys hostel is not good. The quality of food served in a mess is average. Two canteens are available on campus. Sports facilities are not good in our college, but medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a well-developed college campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities are very good, and they provide Wi-Fi for students for the study purpose. There is a well-developed library with thousands of books. Hostel rooms are a bit small, and in one room, 2-3 students are placed. Canteen and medical facilities are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the finest colleges in Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: Each block is allotted for different branches of engineering and medical branches. The college is surrounded naturally. It has a separate entrance for faculty and students. Each building has more than 5 floors, and it looks very attractive from far. The college is spread over more than a thousand acres.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bharti College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is according to the fee that they charge. It is moderate. The college has all the basic facilities that are required in a college. You cannot expect the infrastructure of our college to be like VIT and SRM. They are working hard on improving its infrastructure. Wi-Fi facility is available in few areas on  the campus. Its speed is very poor, so you cannot expect much about it.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking just for a degree, then join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and there are big buildings. Our campus is huge, but there is no playground. There are large buildings, but no facilities are available. The basic facilities are quite good but not extraordinary. There are labs which are barely in working condition.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome in the college. The library is very big on the campus, and the other curricular activities like sports and games are very great. The classrooms are very neat and clean on the campus. The medical facilities also available in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is not good as the students are getting depressed.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the facilities are not proper. The Wi-Fi facility is not in proper range, so its network problem occurs in many places. The labs are not clean. The space in the classrooms are proper, but there is no light in classrooms as we open windows for getting light. The medical facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Te facilities and faculty members both could be better.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and faculty members both are below average. Just advertises as a good one. Still it is okay to survive. Has no Wi-Fi provided in college. As well as hostel. There are nogood network in most rooms, food again is below avg. Doesn't even has breakfast or snacks except for holidays only break fast.

reviews.review_heading: Our college does not provide high placements in 2015.
reviews.review_text: The college canteen is very bad, and it is not properly clean. The canteen does not have a seating arrangement. Food served in a mess is not good because it only serves one type of food. Medical facilities are available. There is no space for parking a bike and car.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, best faculty and all facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for this course is good and the facilities are - 24*7 Wi-Fi networks and AC library open all the time. Classrooms and labs are well cleaned with good infrastructure. Hostel facilities and quality of food available in the mess is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for everyone.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome in Bharti group of college. It has it's style of making up the things. There are the wonderful high tech lab and classrooms with CCTV cameras and smart board. The library is the main Thing in the infrastructure. As it is amazing which works 365 days until midnight. The hostel rooms are average and food Is superb. Overall hostels are good.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review from alumini
reviews.review_text: a well located college. the location is very suitable for studying it is located in the outskirts of the city so that the student can concentrate on studies a very calm and relaxing environment is provided to study the campus has integrated wifi routers classrooms are well maintained too.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Dr. Somervell Memorial CSI Medical College and Hospital.

review_content.Placements: Around 150 students are accepted here every year based on Neet UG rank & eligibility. We follow the CBME curriculum, which is more clinical-based than before. There is a one-year compulsory rotation or internship following 4.5 years study. Approx. 10,000 is paid for internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the basic facilities and amenities are available in the college for studies. We have separate building for each subject in the first 2 years, and we have have separate building for attending lectures. A 24-hour functioning restaurant is present within the campus. The library is open every day till 10 p.m., except Sunday.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied up to a certain extent.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in the MBBS course. You have to apply for a job in the private or government sector. You can get a job as a junior doctor in any private or government hospital. You can also open your own private clinic. You can also serve in the army; there is a separate exam for that.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average, but our college is well-equipped with all the equipment required for practical knowledge. Every lab every year is well-equipped. The hospital is also well-equipped with all the equipment. The hostel is also average, and the food is not up to par for North Indian students or vegetarian students.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied only to a certain extent.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in the MBBS course; you have to search for a job after completing your degree or study further for PG to get better job options. You can get a job in government and private hospitals after MBBS and also open your own clinic. Additionally, you can get a chance to serve in the army.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. Classrooms are air-conditioned and equipped with boards and projectors. The college is well-equipped with all necessary equipment for practical labs. Every lab is well-equipped. The library has all the books related to medical studies and also features an e-library. However, the hostel food is not suitable for North Indian vegetarian students.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Somervell Memorial CSI Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. Somervell Memorial CSI Medical College and Hospital.

content.Placements: The college is a medical college, so there is no concept of placement. Some people who complete their MBBS course from here prefer to give NEET PG or transfer to the Middle East for good opportunities. Kerala itself has low employment if you are just an MBBS student. No companies are coming for placement. Students have to do a permanent 1-year internship where they help and learn more about the practical knowledge of a doctor.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are quite big. It's an old college established in 2002, so the classrooms are like those of a government college. A smart board is there for lectures, with no Wi-Fi facility available in class. The library is quite big, and all the skill labs and subject labs are properly maintained. The quality of the hostel is bad. There is no choice, you must take triple occupancy as there is not enough space, especially in the girls' hostel. There is no canteen in the hostel, and the mess of the college is the worst; the food is not even good, hygienic, and they charge too much for it.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. Somervell Memorial CSI Medical College and Hospital.

content.Placements: The college does not provide any placement, but it does provide internship opportunities. There is a 1-year compulsory rotation internship that is required to be given to the students by the college in their own hospital, and we are paid for the same too.
content.Infrastructure: This college is mostly inclined academically, and here most of the faculty are highly qualified and experienced and always ready to help you out. its all about your interest and dedication, which you need to take in with the faculty, and they are happy to help you out. Hostel life is bad. The mess food is the worst, and the administration mostly does not do anything about it. No matter the amount of complaining you do, it still remains the same. You have to adjust to it. We do have a gym in the hostel, which could be used by the student, but the facilities are below par, and there is a lack of necessary equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Somervell Memorial CSI Medical College and Hospital.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are quite big. It's an old college established in 2002, so the classrooms are like those of a government college. A smart board is there for lectures, with no Wi-Fi facility available in class. The library is quite big, and all the skill labs and subject labs are properly maintained. The quality of the hostel is bad. There is no choice, you must take triple occupancy as there is not enough space, especially in the girls' hostel. There is no canteen in the hostel, and the mess of the c...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Somervell Memorial CSI Medical College and Hospital.
reviews.review_text:
This college is mostly inclined academically, and here most of the faculty are highly qualified and experienced and always ready to help you out. its all about your interest and dedication, which you need to take in with the faculty, and they are happy to help you out. 
Hostel life is bad. The mess food is the worst, and the administration mostly does not do anything about it. No matter the amount of complaining you do, it still remains the same. You have to adjust to it. 
We do have a gym in th...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Somervell Memorial CSI Medical College and Hospital.
reviews.review_text:
All the basic facilities and amenities are available in the college for studies.
We have separate building for each subject in the first 2 years, and we have have separate building for attending lectures.
A 24-hour functioning restaurant is present within the campus. 
The library is open every day till 10 p.m., except Sunday.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied up to a certain extent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, but our college is well-equipped with all the equipment required for practical knowledge. Every lab every year is well-equipped. The hospital is also well-equipped with all the equipment. The hostel is also average, and the food is not up to par for North Indian students or vegetarian students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied only to a certain extent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Classrooms are air-conditioned and equipped with boards and projectors. The college is well-equipped with all necessary equipment for practical labs. Every lab is well-equipped. The library has all the books related to medical studies and also features an e-library. However, the hostel food is not suitable for North Indian vegetarian students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not good. Wi-Fi is not available in classrooms and the library. The library is good, and all books and latest magazines are available for research and the medical field. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is not good. Wi-Fi facility is not available in classrooms, laboratory, and library. The food served in the mess is not upto the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied in terms of faculty and infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Facilities and the infrastructure are at par the level. Wi-Fi is not available, classrooms have no signal at all. Labs and library are good with all facilities. Rooms are spacious and large with double rooms. Medical facilities are free for the students studying here. Sports and games are regular .

reviews.review_heading: Our college is fine and can go for it.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility. There are 4 decent lecture halls. Labs are well-equipped. Library is very big with all the necessary books, journals, etc. for medical education. Hostel is either 3 per room or double sharing. Common bathrooms and attached bathrooms are also available. Mess food is average. Canteen provides shawarma and panipuri in addition to other snacks and shakes.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good and self-financing college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great, and the facilities are very good. Library, classrooms and labs are well-developed and well-equipped. Hostels have a great environment, and almost every facility is available. Food is also good, and we get an adequate quantity of food in the hostel. Medical facilities and sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The library is fine, the mess food is homely. The college is well known for sports. Once a year intercollege dance and arts festival is organised. Sports and arts are encouraged by the faculty. The library consists of all kinds of books.

reviews.review_heading: The college is best for all medical studies.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good. The college blends with nature. Hostel facilities are good. The lecture hall is big and can accommodate 200 students. A private park for college students is available. The college canteen is available, and the hospital building is good. There are sufficient B.Ed availabilities for parents.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculties, average infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: So our college and hostel infrastructure is average and is not upto expectations of the fees that is being paid. It's just like a government college and even the government colleges have more good infrastructure and facilities provided for them. It's not upto our expectations.

faqs.answer:
A:    Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.EdCandidates passed post graduation with 50% marks (5% relaxation for SC/ST candidates) from recognised university or institution are eligible to apply.B.ComThe given marks is for commerce students who have passed 10+2 examination.
Students who have opted for two of the following commerce subjects in 10+2 : Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics, Mathematics, Office Management and Secretarial Practice, Principle and Practice of Insurance, Tax Procedure and Practice should have minimum marks as 40% and 45% for other candidates.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th standard/SSC examination from any recognised board/council.B.E. / B.TechCandidates passed 10+2 with mandatory subjects along with one of the following subjects; Chemistry, Biology, Bio-technology, Computer Science from recognised board are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidates passed Bachelor's degree in any discipline from recognised university or institution are eligible to apply.

review_content.General: Regarding infrastructure, we have a separate building for our paramedical department, which has classrooms, a biochemistry lab, a microbiology lab, an operation theatre for practice, a radiology department, a library, a meeting room, a conference hall, etc. We have all the equipment required in the lab, along with various machines and instruments, fully calibrated. Wi-Fi is available. In hostels, there are shared rooms for two students, with good quality food in the mess. Moreover, extra activities such as NCC, NSS, Scout and Guide, basketball, football, volleyball, and athletics are available. An ambulance is always present on campus for any medical emergency.

reviews_list.review_title: About my college and its placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements were not that good in Doaba Group of Colleges because there was little partnership with companies. But in other factors, like the study, it was satisfactory.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good, and teachers were friendly with students. They worked hard to give their best in the curriculum. I suggested others take admission if they wanted to pursue a degree, but the placements were not so good according to my preference.
review_content.Faculty: The curriculum was followed as assigned by Punjab Technical University, Kapurthala, Jalandhar. Exams were semester-based, and two assignments were assigned to students per subject in per semester. Other activities are also done like cultural, educational, and other activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very nice college if we want to take a degree but placements are average.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college are average. It totally depends on students' skills. Companies like Infosys, Idea, etc., visit the college to recruit students. In our course, they taught blockchain concepts, cryptography concepts, and many new computer science technologies. New roles as per demand are added to the course curriculum.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is free Wi-Fi for hostel students only. Classrooms are very neat and clean. The library is very nice. Hostels are average. The quality of the food is average. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There are also sports and games facilities.

overview_faqs.question: Can Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali are UG Diploma, B.Ed, B.Com, After 1th Diploma, BCA, BBA, B.Pharma, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali has a rating of 3.7 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.9, 3.5, 4 and 3.8 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and supportive staff.

content.Placements: My college is not so famous, but I can say more than average. If I am talking about placements, then not so many, but 3-4 companies came to the college for placement, and some of my classmates got jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is best. There is so much garden greenery. One drawback in my college is that there is no Wi-Fi in the college, and also not in the hostel. If I am talking about food, then it is also average, not so good, not so bad. Can be eaten and survive.
content.Faculty: As I already told you about the staff of my college, the staff is supportive and good, but as we know, some of the teachers are not so bad, but also not so good. But apart from this, teachers help you a lot with everything. This college makes students industry-ready.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical lab Sciences - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, value for money, and good faculty.

content.Placements: I am a final-year student in the Bachelor’s program in Medical Laboratory Sciences at Doaba Group Of Colleges. I belong to the 2022 batch. Our batch is the first to graduate from this college, as the course was newly introduced. From our course, lab technicians and lab scientists are hired by reputed hospitals and laboratories. Some of the well-known hospitals and labs that recruit include Apollo, Lal Path Labs, Fortis Mohali, Government Hospital Phase 6 Mohali, and Max Hospital Mohali.
content.Infrastructure: Regarding infrastructure, we have a separate building for our paramedical department, which has classrooms, a biochemistry lab, a microbiology lab, an operation theatre for practice, a radiology department, a library, a meeting room, a conference hall, etc. We have all the equipment required in the lab, along with various machines and instruments, fully calibrated. Wi-Fi is available. In hostels, there are shared rooms for two students, with good quality food in the mess. Moreover, extra activities such as NCC, NSS, Scout and Guide, basketball, football, volleyball, and athletics are available. An ambulance is always present on campus for any medical emergency.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: About my college and its placements.

content.Placements: Placements were not that good in Doaba Group of Colleges because there was little partnership with companies. But in other factors, like the study, it was satisfactory.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good, and teachers were friendly with students. They worked hard to give their best in the curriculum. I suggested others take admission if they wanted to pursue a degree, but the placements were not so good according to my preference.
content.Faculty: The curriculum was followed as assigned by Punjab Technical University, Kapurthala, Jalandhar. Exams were semester-based, and two assignments were assigned to students per subject in per semester. Other activities are also done like cultural, educational, and other activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a very nice college if we want to take a degree but placements are average.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are average. It totally depends on students' skills. Companies like Infosys, Idea, etc., visit the college to recruit students. In our course, they taught blockchain concepts, cryptography concepts, and many new computer science technologies. New roles as per demand are added to the course curriculum.
content.Infrastructure: There is free Wi-Fi for hostel students only. Classrooms are very neat and clean. The library is very nice. Hostels are average. The quality of the food is average. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There are also sports and games facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is a good college for students to have a better future.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placed. Managers and supervisors give various opportunities to students to achieve their aims to be successful in their lives and can be well settled in their future. Many students got placed in different companies that offer a handsome salary.
content.Infrastructure: They provide good food items in the canteen as well as in mess. The labs are well organized and all the equipment are available. So the student can learn by doing practical things more than by depending on the books. The library is always open for the students.

faqs.question: How can I get into Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.EdCandidates passed post graduation with 50% marks (5% relaxation for SC/ST candidates) from recognised university or institution are eligible to apply.B.ComThe given marks is for commerce students who have passed 10+2 examination.
Students who have opted for two of the following commerce subjects in 10+2 : Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics, Mathematics, Office Management and Secretarial Practice, Principle and Practice of Insurance, Tax Procedure and Practice should have minimum marks as 40% and 45% for other candidates.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th standard/SSC examination from any recognised board/council.B.E. / B.TechCandidates passed 10+2 with mandatory subjects along with one of the following subjects; Chemistry, Biology, Bio-technology, Computer Science from recognised board are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidates passed Bachelor's degr

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shri Balaji Institute Pune (SBIP) offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time and Part Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.Sc., B.A. and B.Lib.I.Sc. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.Sc., PG Diploma and M.A.

faqs.answer: A:    A BSc in Animation offers a strong foundation for a career in the following areas:Animation: 2D & 3D animation, character design, storyboardingGaming: Game design, concept art,  3D modeling, game animationVFX (Visual Effects): VFX artist, compositor, motion graphics designerOther Creative Fields: Graphic design, concept art for film/TV, web design (depending on program)The job market is competitive, but with strong skills and a good portfolio, you'll find opportunities in studios, production houses, advertising agencies, and more.

faqs.answer: A career in media industry requires commitment, dedication and sacrifice of personal time for the sake of staying on front or top, particularly in news industry. A journalist may have to work day in and day out to get breaking news. Similarly, media professionals who are in entertainment or film making need to work with passion which may come at the cost of their personal life. However, in a nutshell, Bachelor of Journalism and Mass Communication degree is enough for a person to fetch a job of any interest in the media field.Few of the areas s/he can choose from, include:TV channelsCirculation and Public RelationsCentral Information ServiceLegal Affairs DepartmentJournalsAIR - All India RadioNews AgenciesPress Information BureauAdvertising agenciesBroadcasting companies.Hopefully, the above information will help you make an informed decision.

answer.text: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

lists: Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our college. Many students got placed in multiple jobs even before the end of the course. Our college provides good placements.

faqs.answer: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Venkateswaraa Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure and good medical practicing on campus.

content.Placements: The college has a good placement record. Around 80% of students in our course are placed in top hospitals like Apollo, Yashoda, and Manipal. The top roles are surgeons and specialists. The highest average salary package is Rs. 25 lakhs per year, and the lowest is Rs. 15 lakhs per year.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with good clinical workshops and campus has the hospital attached to it. The college has good facilities like free Wi-Fi, hostel rooms are good with attached bathrooms, and mess food is good. The campus has multiple sports grounds on campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college environment is very good.

content.Placements: Our college is excellent for education, facilities and jobs. Almost 90 percent of students got the job at a different hospital. The top recruiting hospitals are NIMS, YASODA, CARE and some others. The highest package in our college is 40 lacs, and the lowest package is 6 to 7 lacs. Everyone who attends our college will get a job.
content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities are very good and there is excellent infrastructure in our college. Facilities for our department are provided by college management. They provided spacious digital classrooms, excellent laboratories, etc. There is excellent college hostel facility for the students. The food in the college hostel is very good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The college provides good labs.

content.Placements: When it comes to placements from our college, every year, 70–75% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 20 lacs per year. The average salary package offered is 15 lacs per annum; the lowest salary package offered is 6 lacs per annum. Some hospitals are recruiting. The top role offered is that of a gynecologist.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good. The facilities provided by the college and premises around the college are just wonderful. The infrastructure of the campus is highly elevated and ventilated, and the course involves so much practical work that involves the current.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty and good play ground.

content.Placements: The highest salary offered is 20 LPA, and the average package offered is 15 LPA, the lowest package offered is 8 LPA. Eighty percent of students are placed in my course. Sixty-five percent of students got internships. Recruiting hospitals include Apollo Hospital, etc. Top roles like gynecologist and radiologist.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. The facilities are excellent. The college ground is good. The teaching-learning are 40 classrooms, labs are well-equipped with air conditioning. The library is good, with many books available. The hostel facilities are good. The mess is good, and the food is good.

overview_faqs.answer: The fee for the MSW course offered by UOK Kotak is INR 18,000. Kotak University offers a regular Master of Social Work MSW course in a full-time mode. Selected candidates can submit the required documents to get a seat along with the hostel fee. The hostel fee is INR 4,000 (approximately) and mess charges are as per the expenditure by the students.

paragraphs: Kota University coursesoffers 42 undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in various specialisations of Science, Pharmacy, Arts, Management, Commerce, Education, Law, and Physical Education. Apart from degree courses,Kota Universityalso offers two diploma courses & one certificate course. The mode of application for all the courses is online.Kota University admissionto various courses is merit-based or entrance exam-based. The university also offers UG and PG courses through its affiliated colleges.
Check the below infographic for the Kota University admission process for 2025:
Kota University Admission 2025: Eligibility and Selection

Kota University admissionto the undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral-level, certificate & diploma courses is based on the entrance/merit score of candidates. The duration of all the PG courses is two years each. The table below covers the popular courses offered by Kota University along with respective eligibility, and entrance exams accepted by the university for admission:

University of Kota course admissions 2025 for some of its courses is either done based on merit or entrance exams. Check below the complete UOK admission process:
STEP 1: Kota University Application Process 2025

Kota University conducts the application process for various courses online. The application process for all the courses isINR 500. No application will be entertained in any condition after the last date of admission as given in the university notification.
STEP 2: Selection/ Shortlisting of Candidates

For all the candidates seeking admission to various UG, PG, and doctoral courses, selection will be based on entrance exam-based or merit-based as per the course opted by the candidate. Scores of national and state-level exams are also considered for several courses.
STEP 3: Payment of Admission Fee & Admission Confirmation
Candidates selected for various UG and PG courses need to pay the admission fee of the course to confirm their admission at the university.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for admission to the University of Kota?
faqs.answer: The admission form fee for Kota University is INR 500. Kota University offers various undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in various specialisations of Science, Pharmacy, Arts, Management, Commerce, Education, Law, and Physical Education. Apart from degree courses, Kota University also offers Diploma and Certificate courses. Admission to various courses is merit-based or entrance exam-based. Candidates should fulfil the basic eligibility criteria to be able to apply for various courses offered by Kota University. To submit an online application for admission to Kota University, go to the university's official website and fill it out properly. Submit the form and all necessary documentation, such as the score results from your most recent qualifying exam and a passport-size photo.

faqs.question: What is the fees of Kota University?
faqs.answer: The fee structure at Kota University varies depending on the specialisation and the college they are affiliated with. Check the table below to know the course-wise total tuition fee: Course Total Fee MBA/ PGDM INR 24,000 - INR 28,000 MSc INR 12,000 - INR 24,000 MCA INR 1.25 lakh BPharma INR 1.4 lakh M.P.Ed INR 40,000

faqs.question: What is the application fee for M.Ed at UOK?
faqs.answer: The application fee is INR 500. Kota University conducts the application process for various courses online. No application will be entertained in any condition after the last date of admission as given in the university notification.

highlights.description: UOK is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #397 by the QS World University Rankings 2026 under the category Southern Asia, and #1201-1300 under Asia. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the UOK rankings.

qs_world.description:
UOK has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for UOK indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings.

college_info.college_name: Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College:

faqs.answer: A:    The seats availability for offered courses at Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College goes up to 299. Courses offerred by Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE, PCI.
faqs.question: What is the overall intake at Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College for all courses together?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Pharma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Pharma and PG Diploma. The fee structure for the Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College programmes is around INR 3,26,340 to 12,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College is a well-known institution for PG Diploma, Pharm.D, B.Pharma, M.Pharma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College has course specializations in Pharmaceutical, Pharmacology.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College?

review_content.Placements: Our college provides many courses like B pharmacy, M pharmacy and pharmacy. Our college has a tie-up with a Kiran hospital, so we do an internship in the 6th year. Our course is equivalent to MBBS and PhD. Subjects are only 30, so the percentage is required high. Sun Pharmaceutical, Cliantha and many more companies visit our college for placements. One student got a salary package of 6 LPA from Cipla.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our hostel is excellent because it has all facilities except Wi-Fi and TV. The library is huge. So we peacefully study there. Our canteen is very good. It provides a playground with sports equipment like a bat, ball, chess, football, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am completely satisfied by my college. Also they have all the facilities.

review_content.Placements: 1. 100 students per year are used to get admission. 2. The highest salary is 30000 per month and the lowest is 15000 per month average income of 22000 is given by our college placement. 3. Sun pharmacy, Cipla are the top recruiting companies. 4. Management, producing chemical, quality check are the top roles offered. 5. The highest is 20 Lacs and the lowest is 5 Lacs average is 8lakhs. 6. Only 30% of students get internship in Cipla and sun pharmacy.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1. College provides us Wi-Fi, AC classroom, Books, Full Furnished and developed labs with all equipment, bog classroom with projector, huge library with all books available also foreign authors books are also available. 2. Hostel is very good in our college, the food quality is best and also they give a reasonable rate. They have all medical facilities, every year they organize sports week and also take us to University tournament.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: My batch was 2021, but I got my degree in 2022 because of this college.

review_content.Placements: The placements were not good enough for me, but for my friends, they were. They got all nice placements after completing B and D or M pharmacy, and also, I am not from Surat, Gujarat, so I have to find really good placements in Surat.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities were kind of nice, but the problem was the same everywhere, hygiene. Everywhere, canteen faces these issues, and at some distance we used to go have some chit chat, snack type food for the day, hostel food was also very poor, they were just doing business.

overview_faqs.question: Is Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College is a distinguished institution offering PG Diploma, Pharm.D, B.Pharma, M.Pharma. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College has received an impressive review rating of 4.5 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 5 for Campus Life, 4.5 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 4.5 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An honest review of Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College, Surat.

content.Placements: 1) 100 students are enrolled in course. 2) Sun Pharma, Zydus Pharma, and Zentiva Pharma are the top recruiters. 3) 500000 per annum is offered as a package in my course. 4) CEO, product manager, drug officer, and quality control manager are the top roles offered. 5) 70% students got internship from college .
content.Infrastructure: 1) The laboratory and building are well maintained. 2) The college has its own library. 3) The classroom includes air conditioning, benches, a blackboard, electricity supply, a fan, and a tube light. 4) The washrooms are also well maintained. 5) The college has access to Wi-Fi, projectors, laptops, and computers. 6) There are different labs according to different subjects allotted.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Gujarat, and it provides very good facilities.

content.Placements: Our college provides many courses like B pharmacy, M pharmacy and pharmacy. Our college has a tie-up with a Kiran hospital, so we do an internship in the 6th year. Our course is equivalent to MBBS and PhD. Subjects are only 30, so the percentage is required high. Sun Pharmaceutical, Cliantha and many more companies visit our college for placements. One student got a salary package of 6 LPA from Cipla.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel is excellent because it has all facilities except Wi-Fi and TV. The library is huge. So we peacefully study there. Our canteen is very good. It provides a playground with sports equipment like a bat, ball, chess, football, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am completely satisfied by my college. Also they have all the facilities.

content.Placements: 1. 100 students per year are used to get admission. 2. The highest salary is 30000 per month and the lowest is 15000 per month average income of 22000 is given by our college placement. 3. Sun pharmacy, Cipla are the top recruiting companies. 4. Management, producing chemical, quality check are the top roles offered. 5. The highest is 20 Lacs and the lowest is 5 Lacs average is 8lakhs. 6. Only 30% of students get internship in Cipla and sun pharmacy.
content.Infrastructure: 1. College provides us Wi-Fi, AC classroom, Books, Full Furnished and developed labs with all equipment, bog classroom with projector, huge library with all books available also foreign authors books are also available. 2. Hostel is very good in our college, the food quality is best and also they give a reasonable rate. They have all medical facilities, every year they organize sports week and also take us to University tournament.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: My batch was 2021, but I got my degree in 2022 because of this college.

content.Placements: The placements were not good enough for me, but for my friends, they were. They got all nice placements after completing B and D or M pharmacy, and also, I am not from Surat, Gujarat, so I have to find really good placements in Surat.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities were kind of nice, but the problem was the same everywhere, hygiene. Everywhere, canteen faces these issues, and at some distance we used to go have some chit chat, snack type food for the day, hostel food was also very poor, they were just doing business.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in all terms with an autonomous system & fabulous campus environment.

content.Placements: 96% of total seats are filled every year. Last year, students received packages ranging from 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Zydus, Cadilla, Villa, Lupin, etc., are associated with us. Students can easily secure internships in various companies, hospital pharmacies, or local medical stores. The college also provides a Skill Development course for industry training and research skills.
content.Infrastructure: There are a variety of highly technified labs and research centers. The campus includes numerous pharmaceutical departments like Chemistry, Microbiology, and Pharmacology, equipped with SOP-attached instruments. A huge open ground with a garden in the campus center is available for different sports. The canteen and hostel are attached to the campus, and Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are equipped with digital teaching boards and projectors. The food provided is good quality and hygienic. A fully cost-free library is accessible to both students and teachers.

admission_process.title: Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy College considers scores in NEET, NEET PG, and ACPC Admission for admission to specific courses.Shree Dhanvantary Pharmacy Collegeoffers courses at the UG, PG and Doctorate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 4,01,308. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 3,26,340. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Shri Siddhi Vinayak Group of Institutions are BTech and MBA. The college offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively, with a comprehensive curriculum. SSVGI Bareilly courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry.
These courses are offered through the affiliated universities, such as AKTU Lucknow, BTE Lucknow, MJPRU Lucknow, All India Paramedical Council Lucknow, and UPSMF. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Shri Siddhi Vinayak Group of Institutions in this space:

It has a really strong placement record but certainly is not likely to stand alongside the higher-tiered institutions in terms of complete all-around brand recognition as well as statistics on placements.

faqs.question: Is Shri Siddhi Vinayak Group of Institutions Tier 1 or Tier 2?

answer.text: Jobs after B.Sc degree completion from SSVGI also abound in all kinds of health care, research, teaching, pharmaceutical and so on as laboratory technician, research assistant, quality control analyst, and data analyst. They work in diverse governmental organizations and other such organizations/colleges. Furthermore, these students can acquire higher professional degrees or a postgraduate course to seek additional learning opportunities, leading to high employability skills. Placement Cell of this college assists students in their placements for an excellent career.
